record.text:
velocity cobweb: thickness = |T'(x)|.

at r=3 thins to a point. at r=3.2 thick bands mark slow regions.

the cobweb was always there. the width is what counts.

images.alt: Four cobweb diagrams at r=3, 3.05, 3.1, 3.2. Line thickness encodes local velocity |T'(x)| — thickens where map slows, creating visible bands at period-2.
